rules.description: Restructured prompt with XML tags and extracted role definition
rules.impact: Improved instruction following and section separation

evidence.source: Claude models are trained to follow XML-tagged instructions
evidence.quote: Use XML tags to structure your prompts — Claude is particularly well-suited to working with XML tags.

rules.description: Restructured prompt with XML tags, role extraction, and body simplification for Haiku
rules.impact: Reduced prompt length while preserving key instructions via XML structure

evidence.source: Haiku has fewer parameters — concise prompts perform better

api_hints.reason: Claude requires explicit max_tokens — there is no default
